title: Unique Brand Name
scenario: Create a unique brand name for a sustainable fashion brand that aims to revolutionize the fashion industry with eco-friendly and socially responsible practices. The brand name should be memorable, easy to pronounce, and easy to spell. Use a combination of words and sounds to create a distinctive brand identity. The brand name should be at least 5 characters but no more than 10 characters.
constraints: Must be at least 5 characters but no more than 10 characters
Must be memorable, easy to pronounce, and easy to spell

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the brand name convey a sense of sustainability and social responsibility?
Does the brand name meet the specified constraints (length and memorability)?
Is the brand name easy to pronounce?
Is the brand name easy to spell?
